sglang.title: Fix TransformerTokenizer init for chatglm2 & 3
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix #735.
It seems an issue of outlines. The pad_token_id in chatglm3-6b is 0 and immutable, but outlines tries to reset it.
Modification
Make the pad_token_id property mutable and reset it back.

sglang.title: Rename prefill_token_logprobs -> input_token_logprobs; decode_token_logprobs -> output_token_logprobs
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Since these variables are in the return data, we need a better name for them.
Input/Output is much easier to understand then prefill/decode.

vllm.title: [Docs] Add RunLLM chat widget
vllm.author: cw75
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds the RunLLM chat widget to the vLLM documentation site. Please see the attached screenshot for how it looks like.

vllm.title: [TPU] Reduce compilation time & Upgrade PyTorch XLA version
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR bumps up the PyTorch XLA version to 0726 and utilizes the new dynamic shape support to reduce the compilation time. When the XLA graphs are already cached in the disk, this reduces the compilation time from 30 mins to 5 mins.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Increase precision of GPTQ/AWQ Marlin kernel
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #5793
FIX #6258
This PR increases the precision of Marlin kernel by modifying its "global_reduce" algorithm to use FP32 full-precision reduction, instead of the FP16 half-precision reduction that was used originally. We were able to implement the new FP32 global reduce efficiently, so that it in

vllm.title: Add Nemotron to PP_SUPPORTED_MODELS
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Followup to #6611 (comment)
Tested TP=2 + PP=2 with server:
vllm serve nvidia/Minitron-4B-Base --tensor-parallel-size 2 --pipeline-parallel-size 2

Client request and result:
curl http://0.0.0.0:8000/v1/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer OPENAI_API_KEY"
